markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on optimization priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Prioritize practitioner-focused content (e.g., "Best Tools for X") for conversion optimization, while continuing evaluation content to drive AEO visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Conversion Friction:** High traffic is not converting (only 6 SEO/AEO conversions in Feb) due to a new EIN field on the free trial form. The immediate fix is to prioritize "Book a Demo" CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Content Gaps:** A new "Best Tools for Employee Surveys" article is needed to capture frontline-specific use cases (e.g., no email access), and existing emergency-related content needs AEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**Technical SEO:** Use broad, multi-select tags for blog categorization to add keywords to page code without creating new URLs or requiring complex redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Attribution

  - [**February Metrics:** Record high traffic, clicks, and impressions, but only 6 conversions from SEO/AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Attribution Analysis:** A 60-day GA4 analysis of "conversion signals" (not just final conversions) revealed key trends:](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [**Winning Formats:** Question-framed titles perform best for both AEO and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Strongest Subcluster:** Scheduling and call management content.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [**Conversion Driver:** Practitioner-focused content (e.g., "Best Tool for X") drives conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [**AEO Driver:** Evaluation content (e.g., "X vs. Y") drives AEO visibility but not direct conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Actionable Insight:** Optimize CTAs on high-converting practitioner content to maximize conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)

### Conversion Friction & CTA Strategy

  - [**Problem:** A new EIN field on the free trial form creates conversion friction.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [**Solution:** Prioritize "Book a Demo" CTAs over "Try for Free."](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with the enterprise sales focus and avoids the friction of the free trial form.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [**Placement:** Move the "Book a Demo" CTA higher on blog pages.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [**Long-Term Fix:** A 2–3 month project to simplify the free trial form by pre-filling data and using AI/third-party tools to verify EINs.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

### Content Gaps & Refreshes

  - [**New Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - ["Best Tools for Employee Surveys" → Focus on frontline use cases (e.g., no email access) to differentiate from the existing "Best Automated Survey Platforms" article.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [**Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Emergency Content:** Optimize for AEO visibility, as it currently has none.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Training & Shift Management:** Add comparison elements and promote the handbook.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [**Declining Pages:** Refresh high-performing survey pages to defend their position.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [**Prompt-Driven:** Create new articles or refresh existing ones to directly match specific AEO prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

### Technical SEO & Content Structure

  - [**Blog Categorization:** Use broad, multi-select tags (e.g., Employee Communication, Safety & Compliance) for categorization.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Tags add keywords to page code without creating new URLs or requiring complex redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:** The internal linking project is complete, with pages now linked within their respective content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [**Artifacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [**Correction:** The "Enterprise Bridge" artifact is misdescribed as an HRIS integration. It is a one-way corporate communication layer.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**Process:** Ensure all content edits are immediately reflected in artifacts to prevent future errors.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [Update production team on content feedback (missing images, reframing features).](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [Share the content refresh spreadsheet with Jessica.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Prioritize "Book a Demo" CTAs in new content.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [Repurpose the white paper for the employee texting cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
      - [Correct the "Enterprise Bridge" artifact description.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [Review the content refresh spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [Continue the 2–3 month project to simplify the free trial form.](https://fathom.video/share/z2DASanMscp-gpSdzi9UfPDaBixXwyiu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
